description_long: This object is a wall-mounted radiator with a rectangular white frame and a central section featuring a series of closely spaced, horizontal metallic fins. The fins are arranged in a stacked pattern, likely to maximize heat dissipation, and are protected by a grille with horizontal slats. A small, metallic valve or control lever is visible at the lower left corner of the finned section, suggesting manual operation. The back and sides of the radiator are flat and unadorned, indicating it is designed to be mounted flush against a wall. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or public buildings.
description: A rectangular, wall-mounted radiator with horizontal metallic fins and a white frame, featuring a manual valve at the lower left. The central grille has horizontal slats for heat dissipation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white frame, central horizontal finned section, and a visible manual valve at the lower left.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's slim profile and the protruding finned section with mounting hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat white panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and finned section from the other side.
attribute_pipe_connections: single connection at bottom left, horizontal orientation
